templates.name: Modern Professional (Sidebar)

sample_data.name: Alex Rivers
sample_data.summary: Product-focused Full Stack Engineer with 7+ years of experience in building scalable web applications. Expert in React, Node.js, and AWS, with a proven track record of leading cross-functional teams to deliver high-impact software solutions. Passionate about user-centric design and performance optimization.

experience.description: Architected and implemented a microservices-based dashboard that handles 1M+ daily active users using Next.js and Go. Improved frontend performance by 45% through advanced code-split strategies and edge caching. Mentored 4 junior developers and established codebase best practices.

Developed core features for an AI-powered logistics platform using React, Python, and PostgreSQL. Reduced cloud infrastructure costs by 30% by optimizing Docker container orchestration on Kubernetes. Led the migration of legacy REST APIs to GraphQL, improving data fetching efficiency.

education.description: Graduated with Honors. Specialized in Distributed Systems and Artificial Intelligence.

projects.title: OpenDocs.ai
projects.description: An open-source RAG platform for querying massive PDF documentation sets. Used by 500+ developers monthly.

projects.title: NexusCorp
projects.description: A high-performance IDE built for the browser with real-time collaboration features.

sample_data.skills: JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, Go, Rust, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, GraphQL, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
